titleStmt.title: SII 41.466: original edition by S. Rajagopal

No. 466. (A.R. No. 680 of 1905.) Tiruvēḍagam, Nilakkōṭṭai Taluk, Madura District. On the east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, left of entrance, in the Patrikāparamēśvara temple at Tiruvēḍagam.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya, Jadāvarman Kulasēkharadēva I, Year 2 = 1192 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. This records the royal grant of some land as tax-free dēvadāna to the deity of a minor shrine in the temple of Tiruvēḍagam at the request of a senior officer.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūviṉ kiḻatti meviviṟṟiruppa metiṉimātunitiyiṟ puṇara vayappor maṭantai jeya
ppuyattiruppa mākkalai maṭantai vākkiṉil viḷaṅkat ticaiyiru nāṉku micai
nilāveṟippa maṟaineṟi vaḷara maṉuneṟi tikaḻa Aṟaneṟic camaiya
ḻaippakkāṉal veṅkaiyai villuṭaṉ turantu miṉaṅkaṉakā
ppa Eṇkiricūḻnta Eḻukaṭaleḻu poḻil veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟa
ppakkoṭuṅkali naṭuṅka neṭumpilatatoḷippa villavar cempi
virāṭar pallavar tiṟaiyuṭaṉ muṟaimuṟai paṇiya Irunemiyoṅka Iṉṉa
mutākiya Iyalicai nāṭakam maṉṉivaḷara maṇimuṭicuṭi viḷaṅkiya
ṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkoccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccak karavattikaḷ [śrīkulacekarateva]
rkku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟaṟupattāṟiṉāl matu
ṅka(ḷ) kuḷakkiḻ Irācentirattuk koyiṟ paḷḷiyaṟaik kūṭat
ṉileḻuntaruḷiyiruntu pākaṉūrkūṟṟattu tevatāṉam tiru
veṭaka muṭaiyār koyililt tevakaṉmiyum śrīkāriyañ cey
ḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Ittevar koyilil Aruḷaṉ śrīvallavaṉāṉa virap
laiya nāyakarkkut tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku
pākaṉūrkkūṟṟattu brahmateyam śrīcoḻakulāntaka śśaturvvedi maṅka
muṭpaṭattevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ virap
Ittevarkkut tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku
ttu coḻakulāntakac caruppetimaṅkalattu Aticeyapāṇṭiyaṉ kaṭ
ṅkālum Iraṇṭāvatu mutal Antarāyamum viṉiyōkamum Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili
variyum nam Ōlaiyum taraccoṉṉom Ippaṭi candrādittyavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷ
ṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai tiruvaḻutivaḷanāṭṭu kuṟucci
ṉāṉavaḻuta mūventaveḷān Eḻuttu
Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 41.466 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
